Our story

Crafted with care,
served with love

Sip'd & Co is a mobile matcha and mocktail cart bringing beautifully crafted, alcohol-free drinks to your most special moments. We set up, pour with care, and make sure every single guest feels taken care of.

From intimate mehndis and Eid galas to university formals and weddings, our cart becomes the most-photographed spot at every event.

Who we are

More than a cart —
we're a vibe

Sip'd & Co was born from a love of beautiful drinks, meaningful moments, and making people feel genuinely taken care of. Here's what makes us us.

🌿

We're halal & inclusive

Every single drink we serve is alcohol-free — not as an afterthought, but as the whole point. We believe celebrations shouldn't exclude anyone. Whether it's a dry wedding, an Eid party, or a campus event, everyone gets something spectacular to sip.

🩷

We're community-rooted

We started in the GTA and grew alongside the communities we now serve. Cultural galas, university events, intimate celebrations — this isn't just business to us, it's personal. When you book Sip'd, you're supporting a small, local business that genuinely cares.

✨

We make it beautiful

Our cart is part of your event's aesthetic. We obsess over every detail — from the layered colours in your cup to the way our setup photographs. If it's going on someone's Instagram, it better look amazing. Spoiler: it always does.

💬

We genuinely care

Read any of our reviews and you'll notice a pattern — people don't just love the drinks, they love the experience. We show up on time, we remember the little details, and we make sure every single person leaves happy. That's the Sip'd promise.

Alcohol-free Halal-friendly Community-rooted GTA based Women-run Obsessively delicious

What we offer

The sip'd. experience

01

Matcha Bar

100% in-house crafted flavours — mango, strawberry, banana bread and more. We use only organic ceremonial-grade matcha, natural sweeteners, and real ingredients. Just pure, made-with-love matcha the way it should be.

02

Mocktail Cart

Vibrant, alcohol-free mocktails made fresh at your event. Beautiful layered colours, bold flavours — a drink your guests will photograph before they sip.

03

Custom Menus

We build a bespoke drink menu around your event theme, colour palette, and guests. Themed names, seasonal ingredients, your vision — our cart.

04

Weddings

Elegant, halal-friendly drinks at your nikah, reception, or mehndi night. We blend in beautifully with any wedding aesthetic while becoming the highlight of the evening.

05

Events & Galas

University formals, Eid galas, cultural celebrations — we've done them all. The cart sets up quickly and our team handles everything so you can focus on the party.

06

Pop-Ups

Catch us at pop-up events across the GTA. Follow @sipdco on Instagram to find out where we're appearing next and get your sip in person.

What people say

Everyone's obsessed

★★★★★

"I booked Sip'd for my event without having tried them beforehand, and I'm honestly SO glad I did. They completely exceeded expectations! Their banana bread matcha was incredible — easily one of the best drinks I've ever had. Even people who don't usually like matcha couldn't stop raving. If you're even thinking about booking them, do it. I would 100% book them again!"

Nirujah Kesavan

Reanna Chowdhury
